content:
Hello, I am Apeksha Ghimire, Content Writer at GadgetByte Nepal with an Electrical Engineering Background. I've always been fascinated by how things work, and now I'm sharing that curiosity with you. Join me as I bridge the gap between engineering concepts and everyday gadgets, one review at a time.

Hello, I am Apeksha Ghimire, Content Writer at GadgetByte Nepal with an Electrical Engineering Background. I've always been fascinated by how things work, and now I'm sharing that curiosity with you. Join me as I bridge the gap between engineering concepts and everyday gadgets, one review at a time.
